meta.name: Market Signal Radar
meta.description: Scan curated sources (blogs, Twitter/X, Reddit, Hacker News, newsletters) for market signals relevant to your product category and synthesize a weekly radar report.

parameters.content:
## 41 — Market Signal Radar

**Required:**
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO
- MARKET_RSS_URL_1 / _2 / _3: RSS feed URLs for your category
- MARKET_KEYWORDS: comma-separated keywords to watch

**Schedule:** Every Friday at 16:00
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: You are a market analyst for a product-led SaaS company. Synthesize market signals into actionable intelligence. Prioritize signals with product implications. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 📡 Market Signal Radar {{ $json.week }}: {{ ($json.top_signals||[]).filter(s=>s.urgency==='act').length }} act-now signals
